race.comment: FLASHLIGHT (3) finished 4.5 lengths away in fifth last time out over 2000m at Wangaratta. Lightly raced but did win only try this distance earlier in career. Has good early toe so should give a sight. COUSINS DAY (8) showed good pace and went on to score by 2 lengths last time out over 2156m at Terang. Goes up a rung or two but she is worth serious consideration. NICOFFHOME (1) brings the right form to this race after taking out a 2500m contest at Pakenham last time out by a nose. Big weight but hard to knock the recent winning form. OFF HIS ROCA (2) has a strong record at this course and looks tough to hold out again.
